This movie looks interesting , but I want to clarify three facts 👋😁
 1️⃣ No matter how important you are on the global level, you cannot take Karnak for yourselves 
2️⃣No matter how much champagne you have, you can never fill the Nile
 3️⃣ Regardless of the story of the movie, but if you were in Karnak on a tourist trip and there was a shooting and a murder... you will find the Special Forces sitting next to you..🇪🇬🦅

Slow start. The best acting was from the nurse. The rest was over-acting & over dramatizing. It was a "who dun it" movie but instead of an intense build up with great writing & character portrayal , it relied on overdramatization & cheap cinematography, which was mostly computerized. Overrated. Bring back the movies with the great acting, storyline, character development & real scenes with real extras & beautiful Cinematography . Movies in the theaters should be levels above Netflix in every category. Make people feel again. Leave the WOKE agendas out.
